reviews.comment:
Un lugar adecuado para tomarse un café al paso. El ambiente no es nada del otro mundo, pero está bien para hacer tiempo o un alto en medio de trámites matinales. El café es económico en comparación con otros lugares céntricos, y está bien ubicado.

(Translated by Google)
A decent place for a quick coffee. The atmosphere isn't anything special, but it's fine for killing time or taking a break from morning errands. The coffee is affordable compared to other downtown spots, and it's conveniently located.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHazgySGtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El día 21 de agosto a las 19:30 la forra que atendía la caja nos grito diciendo que “no era moza de nadie”. Le preguntó a mi amigo que necesitaba ya que estaba esperando a entrar al baño mientras nosotros nos habíamos sentado a esperar que ELLA se desocupara para ir a pedir café, cuando mi amigo le explica que esperábamos a para pedir ella nos levantó la voz habíando gente en el local, diciendo que se lo pidamos en caja xq no era moza de nadie, le quisimos explicar y siguió respondiendo de mala manera e inventando que mi amigo le había dicho que ella nos tenía que llevar el pedido a la mesa, cuando nosotros estábamos a un metro de distancia y se escuchaba todo.
Horrible atención, si ella entendió mal mínimo se tenía que explicar de buena manera como se manejaban.

(Translated by Google)
On August 21st at 7:30 PM, the woman working the register yelled at us, saying she wasn't anyone's server. She asked my friend what he needed, as she was waiting to use the bathroom while we sat down to wait for HER to leave so we could order coffee. When my friend explained that we were waiting to order, she yelled at us, even though there were people in the store, telling us to order at the register because she wasn't anyone's server. We tried to explain, but she continued to respond rudely, making up stories about my friend telling her she had to bring our order to our table, even though we were standing a meter away and could hear everything.
Horrible service. If she misunderstood, she should at least explain how things worked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25aZlRWRlJjV1ppU2tkamFHTmpUSFZ4UVVaRVNIYxAB

reviews.comment:
Quisimos comprar unos café y pasar al baño del autoservicio y la empleada mal educada, me grito, me trató mal e invito que yo le pedí que me lleve los café a la mesa y no nos dejo ingresar a los baños. Esta tipo de gente no debe trabajar en atención al público esto fue el dia 21/08/2025 a oasis 19:40 aprox (espero que hagan algo al respecto)

(Translated by Google)
We wanted to buy some coffees and use the restroom at the drive-thru, but the rude employee yelled at me, treated me badly, and insisted that I bring the coffees to our table instead of letting us into the restroom. People like this shouldn't be working in customer service. This happened on August 21, 2025, at approximately 7:40 PM at Oasis. (I hope you do something about this.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCVmVHSkNTWFZFVTNnM1ZtdzJSRFZTVlhSc1NHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Nos sentamos a comprar un café y la señora que atendia el autoservicio nos grito de mala manera y frente a todos que teniamos que acercarnos a pedir y que no hay mozos, como si fueramos estúpidos prácticamente. Horrible atencion de la mujer que se encontraba atendiendo 21/08/25 a las 19:30hs. Prácticamente nos tuvimos que ir.

(Translated by Google)
We sat down to buy coffee, and the woman working at the drive-thru yelled at us rudely in front of everyone, telling us we had to come up and order because there were no waiters, as if we were practically stupid. The service from the woman working on August 21, 2025, at 7:30 PM was awful. We practically had to leave.

Domingo 17hs y el playero ni bola, charlando con el vehículo de adelante mientras uno espera 10 minutos al cuete! Muy floja la atención en este turno, al final me fui...

(Translated by Google)
Sunday at 5 PM and the attendant was completely oblivious, chatting with the car in front while I waited 10 minutes for nothing! The service was terrible this shift, I ended up leaving...

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Daniel por tu calificación y comentarios. Nos alegra saber que está muy conforme con la atención de nuestro equipo, te esperamos nuevamente..!
